{"problem_standardized_math":"Given an iterate \\((x^k, \\lambda^k, s^k)\\) with \\((x^k, s^k) > 0\\), show that the quantities \\(\\alpha_{\\max}^{\\mathrm{pri}}\\) and \\(\\alpha_{\\max}^{\\mathrm{dual}}\\), defined in \\((14.36)\\), are the largest values of \\(\\alpha\\) for which \\(x^k + \\alpha \\, \\Delta x^k \\geq 0\\) and \\(s^k + \\alpha \\, \\Delta s^k \\geq 0\\), respectively."}
